title: VTuber AZKi joins Japanese police to promote new traffic rules
summary_full: VTuber AZKi has been appointed by Japanese police as a Traffic Regulation Ambassador to promote new safety measures.  A key change will reduce residential street speed limits to 30 km/h from 60 km/h starting September 1, 2026, aiming to enhance pedestrian and cyclist safety.  This initiative leverages AZKi's popularity to effectively reach younger audiences with crucial road safety information.
